title: Thump Local LLC
description: I work as an Assistant Digital Marketing Coordinator at Thump Local LLC. Thump is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Long Island, NY.

title: Stony Brook Computing Society
description: I am the two-time elected Public Relations Officer for the Stony Brook Computing Society. SBCS is a student-run Computing Club at Stony Brook University.

title: SBUHacks
description: SBUHacks is Stony Brook University's premier Hackathon, hosted and organized by the Stony Brook Computing Society. I helped organize the Hackathon, specifically managed all the marketing material, generating over 600 leads in the process.

title: Game Development and Design Club
description: The Game Development and Design Club, or GDDC, is SBU's Game Development Club. I served as its Vice President for the 2025-26 Academic Year.
